calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Merrill Schwartz, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Environmental Science Assoc., a California Corp.
Plaintiff Witness Greg Thornton, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s)Biostar Systems, LLC, a Kansas Liability Co. has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted as follows:

Damages/Principal - $172,786.04
Prejudgment Interest - $10,809.18
Waived Fees and Costs for a total judgment in the amount of $183,595.22
Does 1 - 10 was dismissed without prejudice in open court.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
